# Imported Source

This directory is a third-party source import.

## Upstream

- project: `hitrov/oci-arm-host-capacity`
- license: `MIT`
- upstream repo: `https://github.com/hitrov/oci-arm-host-capacity`

## Import notes

- imported into this repository from the temporary local folder `_tmp_oci_arm`
- placed under `third_party/` to keep it clearly separate from native OpenClaw ops code
- upstream git metadata was renamed to `.upstream-git-metadata` to avoid nested-repository issues inside this repo

## Local purpose

- preserve Oracle Cloud ARM capacity helper code as a separate imported utility
- keep the original upstream project structure intact for later review or selective reuse
